title: Pabstiella hymenantha
taxonomy: Pabstiella hymenantha is classified within the family Pleurothalliidae. This family is part of the order Asparagales and the subclass Liliidae. The family Pleurothalliidae is further divided into several genera, with Pabstiella being one of them. Pabstiella hymenantha is an epiphytic orchid, which belongs to the kingdom Plantae. It is native to the Americas, with species found in tropical and subtropical regions.

The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the treatment of various conditions such as wounds, respiratory issues, and gastrointestinal problems.
